g.text: Generated Code Mapping — IDL → Server Skeleton → Client Stub
The "magic": Write the IDL once → ipcgen generates all marshaling, dispatch, and RPC correlation code.
Server developer: subclass FooService, implement handleGetData(). Call notifyOnUpdate() to broadcast.
Client developer: create FooClient, call GetData(id, data). Override onOnUpdate() for notifications.
No manual serialization, no protocol knowledge, no ring buffer management. Just typed function calls.
